final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior design illustration of a Nordic-style home scene (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Scene/backdrop: must include white walls, light wood flooring, and a large window with sunlight streaming through
Lighting/mood: must be clean, bright, warm and comfortable — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a Nordic minimalist direction — exact tones are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
